name: Banner of the Rising Star
description:
A single pale star shines bravely amid the dark cloth of this magical banner. The star can be seen even in the dead of night. While holding a banner of the rising star, you can use the following ability.

Activate—Rise Up 1 (concentrate, healing)

Frequency once per day

Effect The magical banner lifts your allies from the brink of death. An ally within the banner's aura with the condition regains |traits:concentrate,healing] Hit Points, does not increase their condition, and can Stand as a free action. They become immune to Rise Up for 1 day.
